lines.text: Meet Kitchen King Masala — Rainbow's best seller.
One blend that carries every gravy, every sabzi — rich, royal, and ready.
Batch-coded and blended to the gram — the same taste, every single batch.
Blended by Darak Foods since nineteen fifty-six.
Kitchen King Masala. Bring the king home.

bgm.query: warm upbeat premium, Indian percussion undertone
bgm.blob: Kitchen King Masala — the best-seller that tastes the same in every batch
bgm.arc: Hook → Reveal → Appetite → Proof → Legacy → CTA
